Body.Content:
Microsoft Entra ID users can now use a passkey to sign into Microsoft apps on Android devices where an authentication broker like Microsoft Authenticator or Microsoft Intune Company Portal is installed.

GA date: March CY2025

Preview date: August CY2024

message.Title: Microsoft Entra: Passkey authentication in brokered Microsoft apps on Android
